on_screen_text:
2000-3000 rupaye kharch karke bhi 'English nahi seekh paya' kehkar rota hua main [Me crying saying 'I couldn't learn English' even after spending 2000-3000 rupees]
Mysivi app par sirf ₹3 mein English seekhne ke baad. [After learning English on Mysivi app for just ₹3.]
summary: A meme-style ad comparing the regret of spending 2000-3000 rupees on failed English courses with the satisfaction of learning English on the Mysivi app for just ₹3. It uses popular Bollywood movie clips of Shah Rukh Khan to depict these contrasting emotions, promoting the app's affordability.
